note: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ below is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number. Remove this banner only when the unit has been measured/hand-tuned. --- BASE Scarlet (slug `scarlet`, AR/Electric/Attacker/B3) — NOT scarlet-black-shadow. MODEL: S1 = self ATK ▲23.15% on hitCount:10, maxStacks 5, dur 5s — faithful encoding; the engine derives the stack level natively from cadence (no haircut knob; see ⚑2). S1 'Current HP ▼ 4.01%' = self HP COST per proc, UNMODELED as a block (engine has no HP-drain mechanic; not a heal/HP-buff hard-rule class) but it is her design ENABLER: geometric self-drain (×0.9599/proc) puts her <60% HP after ~13 procs (~28s at datamined cadence) and <50% after ~17 (~37s), boss damage only accelerates — so the HP-gated crit buffs below are modeled ASSUMED-ACTIVE (⚑3). S2a '30% chance when attacked → 138.24% additional damage' SKIPPED to unmodeled: 'when this unit is hit' is the sanctioned skip class — the v1 sim models no incoming boss attacks, so the trigger NEVER fires in-sim; real-fight contribution is nonzero and ⚑4-flagged (NOTE: the old materialized file misparsed this as a passive flatDamage with an invented trigger — removed). S2b crit dmg ▲6.61% 'continuously' when HP<60% → passive self buff, gate assumed satisfied (⚑3; over-credits the first ~28s slightly). BURST: (a) crit rate ▲19.57%/10s when HP<50% → burstCast self 10s, gate assumed (⚑3; her FIRST burst ~15-25s may really precede the gate — flagged); (b) 849.15% Burst Skill damage → burstCast flatDamage vs enemy (auto FB-exempt as burst-cast per prior 2, no noFb set; 'all enemies' = the single boss). No weapon swap, no charge (chargeFrames 0), no DoT, no Hit-Rate, hitsPerShot 1 (no split/merge), element = clean ×1.10 default (no Superior-Elemental-Code buff). ⚑1 CADENCE TUPLE (MANDATORY — ESCALATED to likely-wrong): 20-ammo AR with normalMult 27.08 (~3× the usual AR per-shot value) + melee-slash flavor = classic non-class fire-mode tell; ship datamined pullsPerSec + reloadFrames 159 (~2.65s — long for an AR), rolling-reload unknown. Recipe: rounds/min + reload gap from any focus video. ⚑2 S1 STACK STEADY-STATE (prior 4): at datamined cadence (~1 proc/0.83s firing, 5s dur spans the 2.65s reload) stacks sit near-permanent ~5/5; if the real fire rate is slower (⚑1) the level drops — entirely cadence-driven, moves with ⚑1. Recipe: stack icon count / ATK popup mid-fight. ⚑3 HP-THRESHOLD GATES (kit-silent vs engine — no HP trigger exists): S2b passive + burst crit-rate modeled assumed-active per the drain arithmetic above; unmodeled early ramp over-credits S2b ~first 28s and the burst crit-rate may miss her first cast. Recipe: HP bar + first crit-popup timing from a focus video → below-threshold uptime. ⚑4 S2a ATTACKED-PROC (unmodeled): est contribution 0 in-sim / ~0-3% of real solo total (a handful of boss hits × 30% × 138.24%). Recipe: focus video — count her additional-damage popups coinciding with boss attacks on her; if material, model as a dot at the measured proc cadence.

skill2: There is a 30% chance of activating when attacked.
Deals 138.24% of final ATK as additional damage.

caveats: skill1: the 'Current HP ▼ 4.01%' self-drain is not simulated as HP; it justifies treating her HP-gated crit buffs as active (unmeasured assumption)
skill2: the 30%-when-attacked 138.24% proc is unmodeled — the sim has no incoming boss attacks; real-fight contribution is an open ⚑
skill2: the HP<60% gate on the 6.61% crit-damage buff is assumed permanently active (S1 self-drain); over-credits roughly the first 30s
burst: the HP<50% gate on the 19.57% crit-rate buff is assumed active at cast; her first burst may really occur above the threshold
cadence: 20-ammo AR with a 27.08% per-shot multiplier is a non-standard fire-mode tell — the datamined rate of fire and 159-frame reload are unverified estimates
